# Vikas Menon

> Head of Games & Platform at Terra / Ripple AI. Building AI-native games. Previously Executive Producer at Zynga for 11+ years.

## Site Map

- [Home](https://www.vikasmenon.com/): Overview, projects, writing, work experience, about
- [Portfolio](https://www.vikasmenon.com/portfolio.html): Full professional portfolio — Zynga (CSR2, Farmville, Mafia Wars), Terra (Snackula, RedFlag.exe, Plumo)
- [Writing](https://www.vikasmenon.com/articles.html): Articles on game development, AI-native experiences, velocity, creativity, and production

## Projects

- [Bowldem](https://www.vikasmenon.com/bowldem.html): Daily cricket puzzle game (Wordle for cricket). 500+ cricketers, new puzzle daily.
- [Snackula](https://www.vikasmenon.com/snackula.html): AI-native vampire social deduction game. Convince AI-driven neighbors to let you inside.
- [RedFlag.exe](https://www.vikasmenon.com/redflag.html): Psychological thriller escape room with AI antagonist.
- [Fantasy Team Rater](https://www.vikasmenon.com/fantasy-team-rater.html): AI-powered FPL team rating tool (1-100 scale).
- [Helicopter Game](https://www.vikasmenon.com/helicopter-game.html): One-touch arcade challenge — navigate tight corridors.
- [Plumo](https://www.vikasmenon.com/plumo.html): Whimsical puzzle adventure with a cloud character. In development.

## Career

- **Terra / Ripple AI** (2024–Present): Head of Games & Platform. Building AI-native game experiences.
- **Zynga** (2012–2024): Executive Producer. CSR2 Racing (#1 racing, 73M+ downloads, $1B+ revenue), Farmville Country Escape (700M+ franchise downloads, 83M peak MAU), Mafia Wars, Farmville 2.

## Key Topics

- AI-native game design: games where AI is the core, not a feature
- Live operations at scale: running games with hundreds of millions of players
- Game production: velocity over volume, divergent/convergent thinking, resilience
- Side projects and indie development
